speaker: speaker2
text: Quite often . It is very convenient , saving me a lot of time .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have some experiences to share with me ? I want to have a try .

speaker: speaker2
text: You are asking the right person . Here are two very important tips . First , you need to visit no more than one site to find the best products and prices . I can recommend you some online merchants . Second , write your mail address correctly . Otherwise , you can ’ t receive your delivery in time .

speaker: speaker1
text: What about the registration procedure ? Is that complicated ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not at all . You just need to provide your name , address , e-mail address , phone number and bank or credit card information . I will help you with that .

speaker: speaker1
